summary: I've been primarily focused on building a SaaS crypto algo trading platform (summit) with an AI twist — implementing backtest engines, LLM-driven exit decisioning, real-time trading guards, membership tiers, and an interactive dashboard with equity curves and performance analytics. In parallel, I reworked the ESP32-S3 firmware for a USB HID mouse/keyboard emulator (j-uni-hid), adding new hardware variants, dual-core and USB support, and BLE power optimization. I also built a Windows WDK input filter driver (input-driver) for low-level keyboard/mouse capture and injection. Across secondary projects, I iterated on crypto trading strategy parameterizations in freqtrade, researched price-prediction models with Mixture-of-Experts architectures, developed computer vision pipelines for poker table state recognition, maintained a Windows file-tagging utility, built an Android TTS engine with multiple Russian voice models, and worked on an on-device LLM agent for Android with sub-agent delegation and tool-calling. The work spans C#, C++, Python, Kotlin, and TypeScript, covering everything from systems programming and embedded firmware to machine learning, mobile app development, and infrastructure/CI automation.

items.title: Backtesting and AI trading engine
items.description: Built out the trader backtest engine with per-trade MFE/MAE recording, slippage and fee modeling, LLM exit decisioning, and performance optimizations like O(n) replay.

items.title: Trading platform features and fixes
items.description: Added membership tiers, positional trading guards, tag-based trader profiles, equity curve dashboard, Telegram integration, and fixed UI and data-fetching bugs.

items.title: Input automation scenario engine
items.description: Built an AutoHotKey alternative with interception support, configurable conditions and rule sets, and debug logging.

items.title: CV pipeline and profile automation
items.description: Refined the LLM-based CV generation pipeline — added voice enforcement, repo coverage controls, and improved PDF output with skill sections.

items.title: USB HID firmware variants
items.description: Developed new firmware variants v13s8x8 for ESP32-S3 and v13 with expanded USB HID event emission, and added PlatformIO support.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Reworked the Interception-class WDK driver with push-style event delivery, hardware ID and event type filtering, and an integration test suite.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utilities
items.description: Fixed UTF-16 LE encoding for desktop.ini to render non-ASCII folder tags correctly, and added .pdf file type to the context menu.

items.title: Android TTS engine work
items.description: Added question/exclamation intonation sliders, integrated F5-TTS and Piper engines, improved text normalization with RuNorm, and built mmap-based model loading.

items.title: Aim-assist tool refinement
items.description: Switched YOLO inference to DirectML, dropped unused classes, and reworked the bow/flick mechanism with bezier motion and closed-loop tracking.

items.title: Knowledge base firmware
items.description: Added a knowledge base app, FB2 reader, screensaver folder, and Mesh Chat fixes to the e-ink device firmware.

items.title: Trading platform infrastructure
items.description: Continued backtest engine enhancements including published track records and user filtering, plus scanner pair resolution fixes.

items.title: USB HID firmware fix
items.description: Fixed a disconnect issue in the v13 firmware variant.

items.title: E-ink device firmware apps
items.description: Built map and knowledge base apps with tile rendering, FB2 encoding fixes, and an icon-based home screen for the custom e-reader firmware.

items.title: Proxy client enhancements
items.description: Added XHTTP transport support and re-exposed provider APIs via a Mihomo fork.

items.title: Aim-assist debug overlay
items.description: Added HP-based aim scaling, debug overlay window, and YOLO confidence threshold UI.

items.title: Crypto price model research
items.description: Ran hundreds of experiments with Mixture-of-Experts architectures, snapshot ensembles, and temperature scaling; achieved best combined F1 of 0.7817.

items.title: On-device LLM agent development
items.description: Rewrote sub-agent architecture with session-based delegation, added Qwen 3.5 models, KV cache reuse, wake processing service, and tool-safety rails.

items.title: Trading platform AI engine
items.description: Implemented LLM-based entry/exit decision modes with configurable strategy phases deep integration.

items.title: E-ink launcher app
items.description: Built an Android launcher for e-ink devices with swipe page navigation, note-taking focus, and status bar control.

items.title: Aim-assist polish
items.description: Rewrote overlay to D3D11, added linger mode, autofire, and HID click emulation.

items.title: Windows file-tagging release pipeline
items.description: Overhauled CI to automate builds, CHANGELOG generation, and Microsoft Store publishing — fixed multiple API issues and release workflows.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded language support to C++, Go, Rust; added LSP integration, incremental sync, and improved dead code detection for DI frameworks.

items.title: Telegram automation node
items.description: Stabilized an n8n node for Telegram automation — fixed auth race conditions, CI pipeline issues, and added album trigger support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a fast on-host YOLO labeler with multi-select mark mode and keyboard shortcuts.

items.title: Neovim config and dotfiles
items.description: Migrated to Neovim 0.11+ LSP API, added OSC 52 clipboard support, and fixed treesitter parser setup.

items.title: Trading monitor app
items.description: Polished a Flutter-based freqtrade monitoring app with glassy cards, winrate charts, and import/export features.

items.title: Trading bot monitor app
items.description: Added web project with Docker support, improved daily profit calculations, and enhanced Telegram authentication.

items.title: Poker computer vision pipeline
items.description: Achieved high-accuracy hand and board card detection — added recovery module, interpreted timeline visualization, and comprehensive testing.

items.title: USB HID updates
items.description: Added graceful COM restart handling to the firmware.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Built an Android tasker with touch event visualization and direct launch features.

items.title: Crypto trading strategies
items.description: Iterated extensively on freqtrade strategy parameterization — added, refactored, and backtested dozens of variants with optimized entry/exit signals and leverage settings.

items.title: Trading bot Telegram dashboard
items.description: Built a C# web application for monitoring freqtrade bots via Telegram with Docker support, daily profit calculations, and authentication.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Maintained a Telegram automation tool for content curation, with webhook integration, image deduplication, and multi-target sending.

items.title: USB HID firmware evolution
items.description: Developed multiple firmware versions (v9-v12) for ESP32-S3 — added BLE+USB dual protocols, performance modes, swipe fixes, and Android support.

items.title: AI coding agent tooling
items.description: Extended a multi-session AI coding assistant with squash-merge, git rules system, task IDs, and completion tracking.

items.title: Trading platform foundations
items.description: Began early work on the SaaS crypto trading platform — setting up the backtest engine core, trading guard system, and initial UI components.

items.title: Aim-assist tooling
items.description: Developed an aim-assist tool with USB-HID interaction, rate limiting, and mode support.

items.title: Telegram n8n node work
items.description: Maintained an n8n node for Telegram automation — added Docker deployment, Alpine support, and auth fixes.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Maintained a Telegram content automation tool — added logging, error handling, and summarization features.

items.title: Crypto trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized multiple freqtrade trading strategies with hyperparameter tuning and leverage adjustments.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Updated the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool with CLI support, UI polish, and mutex logging.

items.title: Miscellaneous tooling
items.description: Started personal notes repository.
